name: AA_GT_KUMULATIF_BURAK
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[AA_GT_KUMULATIF_BURAK] AS

-- Query for Firm 123
SELECT 
    '123' AS FIRMNR,
    H.CODE,
    H.DEFINITION_,
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =1),0) '01_OCAK',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =2),0) '02_SUBAT',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =3),0) '03_MART',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =4),0) '04_NISAN',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =5),0) '05_MAYIS',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =6),0) '06_HAZIRAN',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =7),0) '07_TEMMUZ',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =8),0) '08_AGUSTOS',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =9),0) '09_EYLUL',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =10),0) '10_EKIM',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =11),0) '11_KASIM',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =12),0) '12_ARALIK'
FROM LG_123_EMUHACC AS H
WHERE (H.CODE LIKE '6%' OR H.CODE LIKE '7%')
    AND LEN(H.CODE) = 3
    AND H.CODE IN (SELECT KEBIRCODE FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE)

UNION ALL

-- Query for Firm 223
SELECT 
    '223' AS FIRMNR,
    H.CODE,
    H.DEFINITION_,
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =1),0) '01_OCAK',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =2),0) '02_SUBAT',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =3),0) '03_MART',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =4),0) '04_NISAN',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =5),0) '05_MAYIS',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =6),0) '06_HAZIRAN',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =7),0) '07_TEMMUZ',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =8),0) '08_AGUSTOS',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =9),0) '09_EYLUL',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =10),0) '10_EKIM',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =11),0) '11_KASIM',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =12),0) '12_ARALIK'
FROM LG_223_EMUHACC AS H
WHERE (H.CODE LIKE '6%' OR H.CODE LIKE '7%')
    AND LEN(H.CODE) = 3
    AND H.CODE IN (SELECT KEBIRCODE FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE)

UNION ALL

-- Query for Firm 323
SELECT 
    '323' AS FIRMNR,
    H.CODE,
    H.DEFINITION_,
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_323_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =1),0) '01_OCAK',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_323_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =2),0) '02_SUBAT',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_323_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =3),0) '03_MART',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_323_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =4),0) '04_NISAN',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_323_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =5),0) '05_MAYIS',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_323_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =6),0) '06_HAZIRAN',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_323_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =7),0) '07_TEMMUZ',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_323_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =8),0) '08_AGUSTOS',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_323_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =9),0) '09_EYLUL',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_323_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =10),0) '10_EKIM',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_323_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =11),0) '11_KASIM',
    ISNULL((SELECT SUM(DEBIT+CREDIT) FROM LG_323_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE=H.CODE AND CANCELLED=0 AND YEAR(DATE_)=2024 AND MONTH(DATE_) =12),0) '12_ARALIK'
FROM LG_323_EMUHACC AS H
WHERE (H.CODE LIKE '6%' OR H.CODE LIKE '7%')
    AND LEN(H.CODE) = 3
    AND H.CODE IN (SELECT KEBIRCODE FROM LG_323_01_EMFLINE)
